response: The iPhone 15 Pro, priced at $999, features a 6.1-inch OLED display powered by the new A17 Pro chip and a 48MP main camera, all packed into a lightweight 187g design. It comes with a 3274mAh battery and offers storage options of 128GB, 256GB, 512GB, and 1TB, earning a solid customer rating of 4.6 out of 5.
